name: PARADE
author: Sean McCormick
description: High-key desktop skin — AURORA's daylight twin. A classic 3-across square grid over slow-motion fireworks on a bright white field, painted in the identity-flag palette you choose. A real show of support, built so the photos are still why you came.

pa_palette.label: Flag Palette
pa_palette.hint: The flag the fireworks are painted in. Each burst samples across the whole flag. Palettes are defined in parade-config.php.

pa_background.label: Background

options.wash: Palette wash (faint tint of the active flag)

pa_background.hint: High-key only — palette-matched presets, never a generic colour. The field shows through the fading fireworks trails.

pa_bg_mode.label: Background Mode
pa_bg_mode.hint: Fireworks paints the chosen Flag Palette as slow-motion fireworks. Waving Flag flies that same flag full-screen behind the grid. Mutually exclusive — only one engine loads.

pa_flag_speed.label: Flag — Wave Speed
pa_flag_speed.hint: Waving Flag mode only. Slow drift → active ripple.

pa_flag_amplitude.label: Flag — Wave Amplitude
pa_flag_amplitude.hint: Waving Flag mode only. How deep the ripples run.

pa_flag_opacity.label: Flag — Opacity
pa_flag_opacity.hint: Waving Flag mode only. Default full/bold; dial back if your photos need it.

pa_rate.label: Busyness (launches)
pa_rate.hint: Rocket launch rate (slider ÷ 3 = launches per second). Real-time, independent of the slow-motion.

pa_explode.label: Explosion speed
pa_explode.hint: Speed of the drifting burst particles. Lower = bursts hang in the air; higher = livelier.

pa_soft.label: Softness (pastel)
pa_soft.hint: How far the flag colours are softened toward pastel so they read against white. Flag hues stay true.

pa_border_style.label: Border Style
pa_border_style.hint: How the flag colour travels around the tile borders. Black/brown flag stops are lifted toward grey so the border never goes hard black.

pa_wave_speed.label: Wave Speed
pa_wave_speed.hint: Border-wave clock, independent of the fireworks rate. Lower = faster shimmer; higher = slower.

pa_launch.label: Launch speed
pa_launch.hint: How fast rockets rise before they burst.

pa_nav_line_mode.label: Nav Divider Lines
pa_nav_line_mode.hint: The menu is bracketed by dual 1px lines. Track rides the live border-wave colour; Fixed uses the colour below.

pa_navbar_color.label: Navbar Colour
pa_navbar_color.hint: Background colour of the sticky nav bar. PHP-handled → --pa-navbar-bg.

pa_navbar_opacity.label: Navbar Opacity — Landing
pa_navbar_opacity.hint: Landing page only. 0 = transparent. Raise for a solid bar.

pa_navbar_opacity_inner.label: Navbar Opacity — Other Pages
pa_navbar_opacity_inner.hint: Archive / post / static pages. Leave blank to match the Landing value.

pa_nav_glow_color.label: Nav Glow Colour
pa_nav_glow_color.hint: Outer glow behind the menu links.

pa_posts_color.label: Posts Colour
pa_posts_color.hint: Colour of the post-count number and the "posts" label in the profile header. PHP-handled -> --post-count-color.

pa_panel_color.label: Panel Colour
pa_panel_color.hint: Backing colour behind the content column on every page so it reads over the fireworks/flag. PHP-handled → --panel-bg.

pa_panel_opacity.label: Panel Opacity
pa_panel_opacity.hint: 0 = transparent (the background shows through). Raise until text is comfortable to read.

pa_panel_extend.label: Panel Extend (gutters)
pa_panel_extend.hint: How far the panel bleeds out past the content each side. 0 = flush, 100 = 100px gutters.

skin_avatar.label: Profile Avatar
skin_avatar.hint: Square image recommended. Displayed as a circle, ~77px.

pa_glow_color.label: Text Glow Colour
pa_glow_color.hint: Halo behind title/tagline/bio. Pick a colour that CONTRASTS with the bright field — a white glow is invisible on PARADE's high-key background.

options.per_carousel: Per Post (each post defines its own style)
options.per_image: Per Image (each photo has its own style)

pa_footer_glow_color.label: Footer Glow Colour
pa_footer_glow_color.hint: Outer glow behind the footer text.

pa_nav_tile_gap.label: Nav → Tiles Gap
pa_nav_tile_gap.hint: Vertical space between the sticky nav bar and the first row of tiles.

gsd_disc_color.label: Dock Circle Colour
gsd_disc_color.hint: Colour of the round dock behind the magnifier. PHP-handled → --gsd-disc-bg.

gsd_disc_opacity.label: Dock Circle Opacity
gsd_disc_opacity.hint: Transparency of the dock circle so it can blend into the background.

gsd_glass_color.label: Dock Magnifier Colour
gsd_glass_color.hint: Colour of the magnifying-glass icon. PHP-handled → --gsd-glass-color.
